message.content:
(1) NO. There are no visible CORAL - colored draggable handles on the left and right edges of the selected/trimmed region. The timeline shows an orange - colored waveform, but there are no distinct handles with grip texture (vertical lines/dashes) at the edges of the trimmed region.  
(2) NO. There is no vertical AMBER/orange playhead line crossing the timeline. The timeline displays an orange waveform with time markers (0:00, 0:30, 1:00, 1:30, 2:00) and a total duration of 2:27, but no playhead line is visible.  

The trim tool’s visual elements: The timeline has a dark background with an orange - colored audio waveform. Time markers are displayed at intervals (0:00, 0:30, 1:00, 1:30, 2:00) along the top of the timeline, and the total duration (2:27 / 2:27) is shown on the right. There are no visible draggable handles or a playhead line.
